headline: **MLB Daily Recap: April 14, 2026**
article:
The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a thrilling 4-3 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Merrill Kelly earning the win. The Detroit Tigers edged the Kansas City Royals 2-1, securing a narrow victory. The Washington Nationals secured a 5-4 win over the Pittsburgh Pirates, with CJ Abrams leading the charge at the plate.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their team's availability. Jared Oliva has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left wrist hamate fracture by the San Francisco Giants. Harrison Bader has also been placed on the 10-day injured list retroactive to April 12, 2026, with a left hamstring strain by the San Francisco Giants. Zach Pop has been placed on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 13, 2026, with a right calf strain by the Philadelphia Phillies.

The Philadelphia Phillies made a roster move, trading RHP Griff McGarry to the Los Angeles Dodgers for Future Considerations and International Bonus Pool Money. The San Francisco Giants also made a roster move, placing Jared Oliva on the 10-day injured list.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Edge Orioles in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a 4-3 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Merrill Kelly earning the win.

top_news.title: **Royals Fall Short in Motor City**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers edged the Kansas City Royals 2-1, securing a narrow victory. Will Vest earned the win with a strong 1.0 IP, striking out 3 batters and allowing 0 ER.

top_news.title: **Nationals Edge Pirates in Thrilling 5-4 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a narrow win over the Pittsburgh Pirates, with CJ Abrams leading the charge at the plate. Abrams collected 3 hits, including a home run, and drove in 2 runs in the contest.

top_news.title: **Giants Fall Short in Cincinnati**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants suffered a 1-2 loss to the Cincinnati Reds, with Willy Adames leading the team in batting with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 1 RBI. Robbie Ray pitched 5.0 innings, striking out 6 batters and allowing 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Giants Place Jared Oliva on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: San Francisco Giants outfielder Jared Oliva has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left wrist hamate fracture.

top_news.title: **Phillies Make Roster Move**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies traded RHP Griff McGarry to the Los Angeles Dodgers for Future Considerations and International Bonus Pool Money.
